info.name: EmployeeTask API
info.description:
Complete API collection for the Employee Work Task Request (طلب مهمة عمل) module.

**Base URL:** `{{url}}/api/v1`
**Auth:** Bearer token via `{{token}}` variable.

Import this file into Postman and set the collection variables before running.
